name: Barbequed Shrimp and Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel shrimp and cut chicken into 1-inch cubes.
2. Combine minced garlic, onion powder, ground cumin, and melted butter in a bowl to make the marinade.
3. Marinate the shrimp and chicken while preparing the grill.
4. Thread the shrimp and chicken onto separate skewers.
5. Place the skewers about 5 inches above hot coals. Cook for approximately 5 minutes on each side for shrimp and 0 minutes (no cooking time needed) for chicken, turning once or twice during grilling.
6. Baste frequently with the remaining marinade while cooking.
